title: pinguicula vulgaris var. brevifolia
intro: Pinguicula vulgaris var. brevifolia, also known as the broad-leaved butterwort, is a rare and unique carnivorous plant species found in Europe and North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pinguicula vulgaris var. brevifolia include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, which can help prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make topical creams and ointments, as well as teas, which can be consumed to aid in digestion and relieve respiratory issues.
